article.title: Reference
article.snippet: References for suzzy APIs and Services
article.text: All requests to the api should be made to the following URL: https://apis.suzzygames.com/v1/
Each response will include headers related to ratelimiting, follow them otherwise the server will automatically reject your request and respond with a 429 Too Many Requests error.
article.quote: Sending too many bad requests too quickly will result in your IP Address being blocked temporarily.
Frequent abusers will get the ban hammer!
article.text: User Uploads (Avatars, Banners, etc.) are available at https://content.suzzygames.com/ using the following paths:
article.quote: Image Extensions: webp, png, gif (if animated)
Animated images will have their hash begin with "a_"
article.text: Ocasionally users won't have uploaded an avatar, you can use the provided default ones by calculating the index with index = {user.id} % 6 and using the follow URL:
Default colors for user profiles are available below:
